name: Cision PR & Communications Intelligence API
what_it_does: Cision REST API for PR and communications intelligence platform (includes PR Newswire, Brandwatch, Falcon.io). Enables AI agents to access media database of 1.4M+ journalists and influencer contacts, handle press release distribution via PR Newswire, retrieve media monitoring and coverage analytics, access earned media value and PR analytics, manage media list building and targeting workflows, handle social listening and brand monitoring data, retrieve competitive intelligence and share-of-voice, access broadcast monitoring and TV/radio coverage, manage PR campaign performance tracking, and integrate communications data with CRM and marketing platforms.
use_cases: Accessing journalist and media contact database from PR outreach automation agents
Managing press release distribution from communications automation agents
Retrieving media coverage and earned media analytics from PR intelligence agents
Integrating PR data with CRM from communications analytics agents
not_for: Small teams without PR department and media relations budget
Social media management without earned media and PR focus
Digital advertising without earned media measurement
best_when: A PR team, communications agency, or enterprise brand using Cision wants AI agents to automate media outreach targeting, press release distribution, coverage monitoring, earned media analytics, and CRM integration.
avoid_when: PRIVACY+LEGAL: Journalist and media contact database contains personal information — GDPR and CAN-SPAM compliance required for outreach. Automated press release distribution must be accurate — errors distribute to thousands of media outlets instantly. Media monitoring of competitor coverage may have content licensing restrictions.

auth.notes: Cision uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Account-level credentials with media database, distribution, and monitoring scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Webhooks for coverage and distribution events. Platform includes PR Newswire, Brandwatch (social), and Falcon.io.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise PR subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Module-based subscription: media database, distribution, monitoring, analytics
pricing.notes: Chicago, Illinois. Private (Platinum Equity-owned). Founded 1867 (as a clipping service). Acquired PR Newswire (2016), Brandwatch (2021), Falcon.io (2018). Major PR technology platform. 75,000+ customers globally. 1.4M+ media contacts. $800M+ revenue. Competes with Meltwater and PRWeb for PR distribution.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; press release distribution limited by license

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY+LEGAL: Journalist database is personal data — GDPR and CAN-SPAM compliance for automated outreach; opt-out management required
Press release distribution via PR Newswire distributes to thousands of outlets — errors are immediately public and very difficult to retract
No public MCP server — REST API with limited developer documentation
Platform is an amalgamation of acquisitions — API consistency across PR Newswire, Brandwatch, Falcon.io may vary
Media monitoring content licensing — full article text redistribution may be restricted
Private equity ownership — verify API roadmap stability
agent_readiness.security_notes: Media database and PR data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU data residency. Journalist PII and distribution channel sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: PR and media intelligence data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU data residency. Journalist database PII and press release distribution.
